mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount FROM docs_peerreview info WHERE COALESCE(info.deleted_yn, 'N') = 'N'
AND info.peerreview_no ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{peerreviewNo}, '%')
AND info.peerreview_nm ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{peerreviewNm}, '%')
AND info.status = #{statusCd}
AND info.insert_dt BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{requestStartDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{requestEndDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + INTERVAL '1 DAY'

SELECT 'K8-PeerReview-' || LPAD( (COALESCE( MAX( CASE WHEN peerreview_no ~ '^K8-PeerReview-[0-9]+$' THEN CAST(SUBSTRING(peerreview_no FROM 15) AS INTEGER) ELSE NULL END ), 0 ) + 1)::text, 3, '0' ) AS nextNo FROM docs_peerreview WHERE COALESCE(deleted_yn, 'N') = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO docs_peerreview ( object_id, cn_serial, peerreview_no, peerreview_nm, rev_no, file_nm, org_file_nm, file_path_nm, file_size, current_page_no, total_page_no, processing_status, status, approver, revieweruser, approved_users, reviewdate, insert_uid, insert_user_nm, insert_dt, deleted_yn ) VALUES ( #{objectId}, CAST(#{cnSerial} AS INTEGER), #{peerreviewNo}, #{peerreviewNm}, COALESCE(NULLIF(#{revNo}, ''), '00'), #{fileNm}, #{orgFileNm}, #{filePathNm}, #{fileSize}, COALESCE(NULLIF(#{currentPageNo}, ''), '1'), COALESCE(NULLIF(#{totalPageNo}, ''), '1'), 'PROCESSING', COALESCE(NULLIF(#{status}, ''), '승인진행중'), #{approver}, #{revieweruser}, '', #{reviewdate}, #{sessionUser.userId}, COALESCE(NULLIF(#{sessionUser.userNm}, ''), #{sessionUser.username}), NOW(), 'N' )
mapper.select: SELECT object_id AS objectId, insert_uid AS insertUid, insert_user_nm AS insertUserNm, approver AS approver, revieweruser AS reviewerUser, approved_users AS approvedUsers, status AS status, COALESCE(deleted_yn, 'N') AS deletedYn FROM docs_peerreview WHERE object_id = #{objectId}

SELECT object_id AS "objectId", 1 AS "fileNo", COALESCE(NULLIF(org_file_nm, ''), NULLIF(file_nm, ''), peerreview_nm) AS "orgFileNm", COALESCE(file_path_nm, '') AS "filePathNm", COALESCE(NULLIF(file_size, ''), '0') AS "fileSize", COALESCE(processing_status, '') AS "processingStatus" FROM docs_peerreview WHERE object_id = #{objectId} AND ( COALESCE(org_file_nm, '') <> '' OR COALESCE(file_path_nm, '') <> '' OR COALESCE(file_nm, '') <> '' )

SELECT object_id AS "objectId", 1 AS "fileNo", COALESCE(NULLIF(org_file_nm, ''), NULLIF(file_nm, ''), peerreview_nm) AS "orgFileNm", COALESCE(file_path_nm, '') AS "filePathNm", COALESCE(NULLIF(file_size, ''), '0') AS "fileSize", COALESCE(processing_status, '') AS "processingStatus" FROM docs_peerreview WHERE TRIM(peerreview_no) = TRIM(#{peerreviewNo}) AND COALESCE(deleted_yn, 'N') = 'N' AND ( COALESCE(org_file_nm, '') <> '' OR COALESCE(file_path_nm, '') <> '' OR COALESCE(file_nm, '') <> '' ) ORDER BY insert_dt DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT object_id AS objectId, file_path_nm AS filePath, org_file_nm AS orgFileNm, file_nm AS fileNm, file_size AS fileSize FROM docs_peerreview WHERE object_id = #{objectId}
SELECT object_id FROM docs_peerreview WHERE TRIM(peerreview_no) = TRIM(#{peerreviewNo}) AND COALESCE(deleted_yn, 'N') = 'N' ORDER BY insert_dt DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE docs_peerreview SET deleted_yn = 'Y' WHERE object_id = #{objectId} AND COALESCE(deleted_yn, 'N') = 'N'
UPDATE docs_peerreview SET file_path_nm = #{filePathNm}, file_size = #{fileSize}, processing_status = 'DONE' WHERE object_id = #{objectId} AND COALESCE(deleted_yn, 'N') = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT object_id AS objectId, approver_id AS approverId, comment_txt AS comment FROM DOCS_PEERREVIEW_APPROVAL_COMMENT WHERE object_id = #{objectId}
mapper.update: INSERT INTO DOCS_PEERREVIEW_APPROVAL_COMMENT ( OBJECT_ID, APPROVER_ID, COMMENT_TXT, UPDATE_DT ) VALUES ( #{objectId}, #{approverId}, #{comment}, NOW() ) ON CONFLICT (OBJECT_ID, APPROVER_ID) DO UPDATE SET COMMENT_TXT = EXCLUDED.COMMENT_TXT, UPDATE_DT = NOW()
